title: Per-sheet attribution + license footer + manifest
context: OFL licensing requires that OFL font attribution and the license text accompany any redistribution. CC-BY-4.0 output requires attribution on every sheet. Without an automated footer and manifest, maintainers must add these manually, which is error-prone and will eventually be omitted. The footer must be part of the render pipeline so attribution is structurally guaranteed — no sheet can be generated without it.
objective: Implement a per-sheet SVG footer that embeds font attribution and CC-BY-4.0 license notice in every generated sheet, and a per-batch manifest JSON recording the provenance of every file in a render run.
acceptanceCriteria: Every generated SVG (and resulting PDF) includes a visible footer with: font name and OFL attribution, CC-BY-4.0 license notice, and project URL/source.
Footer text is legible at standard print resolution and does not overlap sheet content.
A manifest JSON is emitted per render batch recording: file paths, script, template, variant, paper size, font provenance reference, and CC-BY-4.0 license.
Footer and manifest are produced automatically by the render pipeline — they cannot be suppressed or omitted.
Footer content is sourced from the AssetProvenance record in the ScriptModel, so it stays correct when the font is updated.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md section 7A (OFL specifics — attribution required), section 7G (output licensing CC-BY-4.0)
pdf-006 (SVG→PDF pipeline where footer is embedded)
output: Per-sheet attribution footer and per-batch manifest implementation in packages/core/cli, committed via PR with DCO sign-off.
